data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp completes conversion, begins trading on Nasdaq as "LSBK" on July 21, 2025.
data.description: Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: LSBK) in Dunkirk, NY, has announced the completion of the conversion of Lake Shore, MHC to a stock form, along with a stock offering. The bank, now a New York chartered commercial bank, finalized these changes after the business day ended. Lake Shore Bancorp's common stock will commence trading on the Nasdaq Global Market with the ticker symbol "LSBK" on July 21, 2025.

data.title: Premier Health Partners reports cyber incident affecting privacy of certain individuals' info on July 12, 2023.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Dayton, Ohio, Premier Health Partners (referred to as Premier Health) has announced a cyber incident that could compromise the privacy of specific individuals. This breach was identified on July 12, 2023, prompting Premier Health to take action...

data.title: Oak Valley Bancorp reported Q2 2025 consolidated net income of $5.6M (EPS $0.67), down from $5.89M a year ago and $5.3M in the prior quarter.
data.description: Recently, Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), the holding company for Oak Valley Community Bank and Eastern Sierra Community Bank, announced its unaudited financial results. For the quarter ending June 30, 2025, the company reported a consolidated net income of $5,588,000, translating to $0.67 earnings per share (EPS). This was a slight increase from the previous quarter's $5,297,000 ($0.64 EPS) but lower than the $5,889,000 ($0.71 EPS) from the same period last year. Looking at the first six months of 2025, the consolidated net income was $10,885,000 ($1.31 EPS), down from the $11,616,000 ($1.41 EPS) recorded during the first half of 2024.

data.title: Linkage Global Inc secures $3.5M convertible note financing, potential for $30M total funding for growth initiatives.
data.description: A provider of cross-border e-commerce services has successfully concluded a strategic private placement to bolster its growth strategies. The company raised a significant sum of funds through this placement to support its expansion plans and enhance its operations in the digital marketplace. This move is aimed at positioning the company for robust growth and increased market presence in the e-commerce sector.

data.title: Aventis Energy accelerates expiry date for common share purchase warrants issued on May 8, 2025, exercisable at C$0.10.
data.description: Aventis Energy, headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on July 18, 2025, regarding the acceleration of the expiry date of its common share purchase warrants. The warrants were initially issued as part of a private placement financing on May 8, 2025, with an exercise price of C$0.10 per common share. The company, trading under the symbols CSE: AVE, FRA: C0O0, and OTC: VBAMF, has decided to expedite the expiry date of these warrants, known as the May 2025 Warrants.

data.title: 7 law firms sue Strategy for securities fraud; legal battle may last years, yield no results, as per lawyer.
data.description: Complaints have been lodged against Strategy by no less than seven law firms, all accusing the company of securities fraud. Two legal experts specializing in cryptocurrency offered contrasting perspectives on this matter.
Syrian Presidency: The attack on safe families and the violation of people's dignity is condemned and rejected and will not be accepted under any pretext.

data.title: Dennis Streppa appointed to DIH Holding US, Inc. Board of Directors. Focus on robotic devices for rehab. (Numbers: July 18, 2025)
data.description: Norwell, Massachusetts - On July 18, 2025, DIH Holding US, Inc. ("DIH") (NASDAQ: DHAI), a leading global provider of advanced robotic devices for rehabilitation, has introduced Dennis Streppa as the newest member on its Board of Directors. Streppa assumes the role of Audit Committee Chair within the organization. DIH produces cutting-edge robotic devices that utilize visual stimulation in an interactive method to support clinical studies and intensive functional recovery in patients facing challenges with walking, balance, or arm and hand mobility.

data.title: NCICU praises NC as #1 state for business, thanks lawmakers; NC named top state by CNBC.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, the North Carolina Independent Colleges and Universities (NCICU) expressed their congratulations to state officials for CNBC's recognition of North Carolina as the top state for business in the country. State officials lauded the role played by North Carolina in fostering a conducive business environment.

data.title: XRP surpasses Dogecoin & Ethereum, hits record high in 7 yrs. Can its rivals catch up? Charts reveal the potential.
data.description: XRP has recently reached an unprecedented all-time high after a period of seven years. Analysts are now questioning whether Ethereum and Dogecoin have the potential to follow suit. Market data suggests that the price surge for XRP has been particularly significant, with a notable increase that has attracted attention. Ethereum and Dogecoin are now under scrutiny to see if they can replicate a similar growth trend. The possibility of these cryptocurrencies catching up is being closely monitored as investors and traders analyze the current market conditions.
Fitch affirms Canada at AA+. Outlook stable.

data.title: Stocks drop as Google, Tesla earnings near while Netflix plunges, major indexes down on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, the stock market experienced a decline as major stock indexes saw a decrease. Many top stocks also had significant movements during the trading day. This included Google and Tesla, whose upcoming earnings announcements contributed to the market's uncertainty. Additionally, Netflix saw a notable drop in its stock price following the release of its latest financial results. Overall, investors closely monitored these developments as they unfolded in real-time.

Statement of the Yemeni Armed Forces regarding the execution of a qualitative military operation targeting Lod Airport in the occupied Jaffa area with a hypersonic ballistic missile type "Palestine2" 23-01-1447 AH 18-07-2025 CE

data.title: FLUENT Corp. to issue 2.75M shares to directors in exchange for $137,500 debt settling.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida, July 16, 2025 - FLUENT Corp., a prominent national cannabis brand, has disclosed the issuance of 2,750,000 common shares ("Debt Shares") to specific directors in return for the forgiveness of US$137,500 in director fees owed from April 1, 2025, to June 30, 2025. The board of directors of the Company previously authorized this transaction. The Debt Shares will be provided at the market closing price of US$0.05 per common share of the Company on the Canadian Securities Exchange ("CSE") on June 30, 2025, aligning with CSE regulations.

data.title: Tensions escalate between Trump and Powell over possible Fed Chair ouster; 20% chance by 2025, raising fears of global market impact.
data.description: Speculation is rife that President Donald Trump may fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell before his term ends in May 2026. This move has triggered concerns over central bank independence and the potential for a constitutional crisis. If Trump proceeds with this, it would be the first time in modern U.S. history that a president attempts to remove a Fed chair without cause. The probability of Powell being ousted by the end of 2025 stands at over 20%, the highest since April, on a CFTC-regulated prediction market platform. Trump was reported to have displayed a draft letter firing Powell during a meeting with House Republicans, raising political risks and unsettling global markets. This news has caused a stir in the financial community.

data.title: Matador Tech details CTO agreement with Antoine De Vuyst for designing Digital Gold Platform on Bitcoin.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Matador Technologies Inc. announced that Antoine De Vuyst has been appointed as the Chief Technology Officer and lead designer of the upcoming Digital Gold Platform on Bitcoin. This announcement follows the welcoming of De Vuyst on March 31, 2025. Matador Technologies Inc. (TSXV: MATA, OTCQB: MATAF, FSE: IU3) shared details of Mr. De Vuyst’s consulting agreement, as requested by the TSX Venture Exchange. This development signifies a significant step for the company in its technology leadership and product innovation.

data.title: Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II closes $175M IPO offering 17.5M units at $10 each, includes 1 share and 0.5 warrant.
data.description: In Houston, TX on July 18, 2025, Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II (NYSE: PAII) disclosed the completion of its initial public offering, which encompassed 17,500,000 units sold at a price of $10.00 per unit. These units contain one Class A ordinary share alongside half of a redeemable warrant, with each full warrant enabling the purchase of one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share.

data.title: KB Home opens new community in Bothell, WA - Camas Ridge, with modern homes suited for today's living. $KBH (NYSE)
data.description: In Bothell, Washington, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveils Camas Ridge, a fresh residential community. The leading US homebuilders introduce this project offering a mix of outdoor activities, local charm, and a lively city center. The homes cater to contemporary living trends, boasting modern kitchen setups flowing into spacious great rooms, along with roomy bedroom suites featuring walk-in closets. Camas Ridge aims to attract buyers seeking a balance between nature, community, and urban conveniences.
Trump initiates libel lawsuit against Dow Jones, News Corp, Rupert Murdoch, 2 WSJ reporters; complaint not yet public.

data.title: Midas Immersion Cooling introduces TCO calculator for data centers to compare savings of full-immersion vs traditional cooling methods.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on July 18, 2025, Midas Immersion Cooling introduced its Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Calculator. This tool allows data center operators to analyze and contrast the potential lifetime savings of utilizing full-immersion cooling as opposed to traditional rack setups.
